mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 5.0%, equity discount rates and interest expense rise enough to reduce risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 5.24 as of the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term earnings support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS was 369865 as of the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month change in RSAFS has a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts cross below 1600 thousand units, residential investment and related durable-goods demand weaken, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST was 1588 as of the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or if HOUST declines are not followed by below-median forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 4.5 as of the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not have lower average 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations, or if the hit rate for negative returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A positive monthly trend in industrial production signals firming output and operating leverage for cyclical earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO was 112.3227 as of the latest available monthly snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month INDPRO changes have no positive association with 5-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests, defined as Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of a federal funds rate above 5.0% and falling housing starts tightens financing conditions while weakening the most rate-sensitive demand channel, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 5.0% and HOUST falls over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 5.24 and HOUST was 1588 in the latest available snapshots
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not underperform either single-series trigger, or if joint-trigger 60-day returns are not below unconditional returns in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment is rising and unemployment remains below 4.7%, labor income growth supports consumption without immediate recession stress, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE < 4.7%
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS was 136214 and UNRATE was 4.5 in the latest available snapshots
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition has a lower average 20-day S&P 500 return than unconditional returns or if its positive-return hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices rise over 3 months while the federal funds rate is already above 5.0%, inflation pressure prevents policy easing and raises real-rate uncertainty, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises over 3 months and FEDFUNDS > 5.0%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL was 201.7 and FEDFUNDS was 5.24 in the latest available snapshots
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-and-tight-policy condition is followed by nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the signal Rank IC is below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.
